title: SBOM
description: Generates a CycloneDX SBOM for a project's production dependency closure, using an nx-pruned lockfile so Trivy can resolve the package's own deps in a pnpm monorepo. The right supply-chain artifact to attach to a published package's release.

projectName.description: Project to describe. Defaults to the project the target runs on (`project` is reserved by nx).

output.description: Output file, relative to the workspace root. Default: <projectRoot>/sbom.cdx.json.

runner.description: How to run Trivy: the local trivy CLI, or the aquasec/trivy Docker image.

dockerImage.description: Docker image used when runner is docker.
